mapper.sql: id, order_id, repairman_id, assigner_id, assign_time, accept_time, start_time, end_time, process_note, process_images, material_used, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO order_process (order_id, repairman_id, assigner_id, assign_time, accept_time, start_time, end_time, process_note, process_images, material_used, create_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{repairmanId}, #{assignerId}, #{assignTime}, #{acceptTime}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{processNote}, #{processImages}, #{materialUsed}, #{createTime})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM order_process WHERE repairman_id = #{repairmanId}
mapper.update: UPDATE order_process SET assigner_id = NULL WHERE assigner_id = #{userId}
